## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss HeyGen's content strategy, including blog articles, language support, and programmatic video generation for marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating content for US and EU markets initially, prioritizing languages based on revenue potential](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Implement programmatic video generation using HeyGen's API to enhance blog posts and drive organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Refine website structure to accommodate both translation and video creation product showcases effectively](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Collaborate on improving prompts and workflows for content creation and video generation](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Blog Articles

  - [10 initial articles are being created, with 6 more in progress](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Articles will use the blog template with author info, read time, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Considering moving call-to-action higher up in the content](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Planning to add customer testimonials, ratings, and logos to improve credibility](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)

### Language Support and Directory Structure

  - [HeyGen supports 176 languages, potentially creating 29,756 language pair combinations](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Prioritizing content for US and EU markets based on revenue potential](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Considering a more streamlined approach to language listings, focusing on intent-based search rather than a comprehensive directory](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)

### Programmatic Video Generation

  - [Nav is working on a proof-of-concept using AirOps and HeyGen's API to create videos summarizing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Plan to showcase new avatar video improvements coming in the next 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Aim to programmatically insert generated videos at the top of blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

### Website Design and Structure

  - [Nikan shared a new design template for product pages and blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Considering transition from Webflow to a new CMS (possibly Netlify or Contentful) for better flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Discussing how to structure content for both translation and video creation products without losing focus](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)

### SEO and Traffic Generation

  - [Emphasizing the importance of video content for driving organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Planning to optimize keyword usage in both written content and generated videos](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Aiming to create a virtuous cycle of content, video, and engagement to improve search rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy to sync with Marcel about improving prompts and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Nav to share his current prompts and template for video generation](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Webstacks team to provide more context on content structure for design refinement](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Nav to create HeyGen accounts for the Webstacks team](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Finalize and publish the first batch of blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Begin work on programmatic video generation integration](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Explore options for new CMS implementation without slowing down current progress](https://fathom.video/share/Ypx_FUsmEM4YDMPUrTGJ6cH67Yu8dG_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
